alkylation reagent: alkylated with 100 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 100 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (0.2 µg/µL) at 37 °C overnight
collision energy: using an ion trap detector with high collision energy fragmentation (30%)
instrument: coupled online with a Thermo Orbitrap FusionTM Mass Spectrometer
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol for 30 min at 37 °C
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol for 30 min at 37 °C
